name: benchmark-grid
title: Benchmark Grid
description: A responsive benchmark leaderboard grid for product and AI eval results.

meta.usage: Use for benchmark leaderboards, model comparisons, launch claims, or scorecards. Pass custom benchmarks to replace the default App Bench and UI Bench data.

examples.title: Custom benchmark
examples.code: <BenchmarkGrid benchmarks={[{ title: "#1 on Support Bench", entries: [{ label: "Acme AI", value: 92, displayValue: "92%", highlighted: true }, { label: "Baseline", value: 76, displayValue: "76%" }], domain: [0, 100], ticks: ["0%", "50%", "100%"] }]} />
